scripts.cleanup: bun run clean && rm -rf node_modules bun.lock*
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun build index.ts --compile --outfile dist/kb && bun run clean:build
scripts.build:prod: bun run clean && bun build index.ts --minify --sourcemap --no-compile-autoload-dotenv --no-compile-autoload-bunfig --compile --outfile dist/kb && bun run clean:build
scripts.lint: e=0; bun run typecheck || e=1; exit $e
